message:
feat(web): integrate live WASM demo across all pages

Content (lib/content.ts):
- Add "Live Demo" to navItems between Showcase and Architecture
- Replace "Sparse Diff 602K cells/sec" hero stat with "Browser Render
  60 fps via WASM + WebGPU"
- Add "Browser Native" feature card (compiles to WASM, 60fps WebGPU)
- Add browser FAQ: "Does FrankenTUI work in the browser?"
- Add "Cross-Platform Parity" safety guarantee (byte-for-byte
  equivalent across native and WASM targets)
- Add "Write once, run everywhere" design principle
- Add browserComparisonData: 9-row table comparing FrankenTUI vs
  xterm.js vs hterm across rendering, frame rate, input model,
  architecture, update protocol, resize, testing, memory, bundle size
- Add browserAdvantages: GPU rendering, real kernel, deterministic
  output, zero GC pauses
- Add browserUseCases: web-based terminal apps, embeddable widgets,
  interactive docs, demo pages

Components:
- feature-card.tsx: add Globe + Activity icons to iconMap
- section-shell.tsx: add Globe icon to sectionIcons map
- site-header.tsx: add "Live Demo" nav with Globe icon + "Demo" mobile
  abbreviation

Homepage (app/page.tsx):
- Hero: primary "TRY LIVE DEMO" CTA (green, pulsing) demotes
  "GET STARTED" to secondary ghost button
- Hero copy: "Runs natively in your terminal and at 60fps in the
  browser via WASM + WebGPU"
- New "Works in Browser" section: advantage cards grid + architecture
  comparison table (FrankenTUI vs xterm.js vs hterm) + CTA

Showcase (app/showcase/page.tsx):
- Embed FrankenTerminal widget via React.lazy + Suspense with
  IntersectionObserver lazy-loading (200px rootMargin)
- "Try the Live Demo" CTA linking to /web between screenshots and
  interactive demo sections

Architecture, Getting Started, Built in 5 Days:
- Add "Try the Live Demo" CTA banners with Play icon linking to /web

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
